channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Three British men admit roles in death of Canadian restaurateur killed over $150 unpaid bill
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: US Air Force scrambles to rebuild MQ-9 reaper fleet after heavy combat losses
item.description: As the US Air Force navigates significant MQ-9 Reaper drone losses during its operations in the Middle East, they're turning to General Atomics for surplus aircraft. With their drone inventory shrinking, the military is also salvaging retired Predator drones for essential components. This strategy underscores the hurdles in keeping their aerial surveillance and strike capabilities at peak performance.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Who is Han Seong-sook? South Korea first likely woman Prime Minister in 20 years
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Saved by the barrel: Why crude hasn't hit the $200 mark
item.description: Despite fears of $200 oil following Strait of Hormuz disruptions, prices remain below $100. This resilience is attributed to increased US exports, weaker Chinese demand, and alternative supply routes. While some shipping through the strait continues, overall transits are down. Emergency measures and subdued demand have averted the worst-case scenario, but market stability hinges on temporary solutions.
item.dc:creator: TOI Business Desk

item.title: Israeli soldiers open fire at car in West Bank; 7-month-old infant dies
item.description: In a heartbreaking incident in Hebron, a Palestinian infant lost his life after Israeli soldiers opened fire on his family's vehicle. The father recounted how they had paused and raised their hands in surrender moments before the shots erupted. According to the IDF, the troops perceived the car as a potential threat due to its speed.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Russia downs 339 Ukrainian drones in 13 hours amid Zelenskyy' s call to end war
item.description: In a significant escalation of the conflict, Russia boasts of successfully downing 339 Ukrainian drones over 13 regions in a mere 13 hours, even near Moscow, illustrating the fierce drone warfare at play. Tragically, the impact of Russian offensives continues to be felt in Ukraine, as recovery efforts in Zaporizhzhia uncover lost lives.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: ‘Anachronistic dream’: Kim Jong Un’s sister rejects US denuclearisation push ahead of Xi visit
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Concentration of curry': Singapore blocks 14 anti-Indian posts likely from China
item.description: Singapore has ordered YouTube, Facebook, and X to block 14 posts targeting its Indian community and multiculturalism. The Ministry of Home Affairs stated the content, originating from overseas and likely China, aimed to sow discord by attacking the nation's multiracial society. These actions underscore Singapore's commitment to social cohesion and opposition to xenophobia.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Iran peace deal at risk? US considers redirecting Iranian assets to Gulf states
item.description: The US is exploring redirecting frozen Iranian assets to Gulf states for rebuilding after missile and drone strikes. This move comes as indirect negotiations between the US and Iran remain deadlocked, with Tehran demanding the release of $24 billion in frozen funds. Military tensions continue to escalate across the region despite ongoing diplomatic efforts.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Is Israel spying on US? Iran talks come under spotlight as espionage concerns grow
item.description: US intelligence agencies are reportedly concerned about Israeli espionage targeting American negotiators involved in Iran peace talks. Recent assessments suggest intensified Israeli surveillance on senior US officials, raising counterintelligence threats to a critical level. This comes amid diverging US-Israeli objectives regarding Iran, potentially impacting future military cooperation.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Ohio mass shooting: Multiple injured in Toledo Old West End festival, manhunt under way
item.description: Twelve people were shot near Toledo's Old West End Festival on Saturday afternoon, prompting a large police response. All victims are expected to survive. Authorities are investigating the incident, which occurred during the popular community event, and are seeking information to identify the suspects.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Indian man shot dead in Philadelphia after delivering pizza to a housing complex after midnight
item.description: Tragedy struck North Philadelphia as Indian delivery driver Anshul Kuncha was fatally shot after a pizza delivery to a vacant unit. Investigators are pursuing a lead from the phone number used for the order. Surveillance footage shows two individuals following Kuncha before the incident. No arrests have been made.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: NRI maths teacher from Australia, crores of propertyin India: Chilling murder plot by family members revealed
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Who was Weston Higginbotham? Missing US student found dead in Japan, cause unknown
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: American builders made houses with puja room, spice kitchen for Indians; Trump aide says 'completely end H-1B visa'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Donald, Donald Trump': US prez posts self-praise anthem claiming world can't stop loving him
item.description: US President Donald Trump shared an AI-generated music video on Truth Social, celebrating his global admiration. The song, by Republican candidate Anthony Constantino, features exaggerated visuals of Trump in fantastical scenarios. Constantino expressed pride in Trump's endorsement of the track, which has garnered attention for its unique content and repetitive praise.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: New York caste discrimination bills fail to advance: 'As a Bahujan Hindu myself....'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'The gift reflects...': Why WhatsApp co-founder Jan Koum donates $200 million to a Jerusalem hospital now
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Why would any American kid go into engineering if he thinks....': Fox News' Laura Ingraham asks Republican leader on his anti-H-1B bill
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: British man wrongly jailed 17 years for rape says rapist's 24-year sentence is an 'insult'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
